title: feat: add OpenRouter frontier models
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds Kimi K3, Grok 4.5, Gemma 4 31B, MiMo V2.5/Pro, and Qwen3.7 Max through OpenRouter.
- Moves Qwen3.7 Plus from Fireworks to OpenRouter with updated pricing, context, and cache-write accounting.
- Adds paid-only HappyHorse 1.1 video generation and keeps expensive text models paid-only.
- Extends OpenAI usage parsing for cache-write, video-input, and image-output tokens.

Checks:
- Biome on all changed source files
- Gen model, cache, billing, image/video, VCR, and safety suites: 247 tests
- Enter aliases, pricing, and effective-price snapshot suites: 279 tests

gist.headline: The model garden got frontier-sized
gist.blurb: A fresh batch of frontier models has landed through OpenRouter, plus a paid video horse with unusually strong opinions about pixels. The hive can now keep better track of cache writes, video inputs, and image outputs while it works.
gist.summary: Added Kimi K3, Grok 4.5, Gemma 4 31B, MiMo V2.5/Pro, and Qwen3.7 Max through OpenRouter; moved Qwen3.7 Plus from Fireworks to OpenRouter with updated pricing, context, and cache-write accounting; and added paid-only HappyHorse 1.1 video generation.
gist.impact: Developers can call a broader set of frontier text models and HappyHorse 1.1 video generation through pollinations, with usage headers that now account for cache-write, video-input, and image-output tokens.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy model greenhouse where Polly tends labeled code-plants representing Kimi, Grok, Gemma, MiMo, and Qwen, while a friendly tiny pixel horse trots out of a retro video terminal. A CRT monitor robot holds a glowing usage ledger with cache, video, and image token icons, making the expanded model catalog and more precise accounting visible without turning the scene into a spreadsheet.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blushes, a small happy smile, and rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing tiny gardener overalls as she waters code-plants labeled KIMI, GROK, GEMMA, MIMO, and QWEN in a lime green (#ecf874) greenhouse; a cute CRT-monitor robot holds a token ledger while a small friendly pixel horse emerges from a retro video terminal. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, with flowers and vines around the terminals; pixel-font text: "MORE MODELS". Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
